titleStmt.title: SII 25.292: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 292. (A.R. No. 292 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.
The record commences with the praśasti, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara-iru-nilamaḍandaiyum, etc., of the king. It furnishes the details of date viz., year 9, Makara, Wednesday and Kēṭṭai (Jyēshṭha)-nakshatra.

It refers to a deed executed by the Sabhai of Vembārrūr alias Śōḻamāttṁāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu to the Ādichaṇḍēsvaras, the mūlabhṛitya of the temple of Śrīkuḍittiṭṭai-Paramasvāmi of the above village after receiving a sum of 65 kāśu received from the latter, and granted remission of taxes such as siddhāyam, paddy for pañchavāram, the taxes paid by the village for cereals, oil, ghee, etc., ēri-īṟai, kulai, kurambu included in veṭṭi and vēdaṉai, śilvari and others on the lands was made over to meet the requirements of worship and food-offerings to the deity and the priest who performs the worship. It is stipulated that the sabhai or the śrīkāryañ-cheyvār should not collect the taxes or the bhōgam from the lands. The signatories who attested the deed were learned brāhmaṇas-kramavits, sōmayājins and bhaṭṭas residing in the quarters chēris of Vēmbaṟṟūr. The (chēris) referred to are Arumoḻidēvachchēri, Jananāthachchēri, Nittavinōdachchēri, Rājakēsarichcheri, Nigariliśōḻachchēri, Aḻagiyaśōḻachchēri, Śiṅgaḷāntakachchēri, Kundavaichchēri, Śōḻakulasundarachchēri, Rājamāttāṇḍachchēri, Rājarājachchēri and Śōḻamāttāṇḍachchēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉnivaḷara Iruni
la maṭantaiyum poṟccayappāvai
yum cirttanic celviyum taṉ pe
ru n=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyil Ūḻi
yuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉaveli
ppaṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷ
ḷippākkaiyum naṇṇalkkarumuraṇ maṇṇai
kkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tammuṭiyum Ā
ṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉa
van pakkal tenṉavan vaitta cun=tara muṭiyum [ In=taraṉāramu]
m teṇṭiraip porukaṭal Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eripa
ṭaik keraḷan muṟaimayiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palarpuka
ḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velaittolña
peruṅkāval palpaḻaṉ tīvum
pattorukāl Araicukaḷaikkaṭṭa paracurāma mevaruñ
cān=timattivaparaṉatu karuti Iruttiya cempoṟttiruttaku mu
ṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimiku muyaṅkiyal mutukiṭṭoḷitta
cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭi E
ḻarai Ilakkamum mavanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum māp
peru taṇṭāṟk koṇṭa kopparakesari panmarāṉa śrīrā
jentra coḷadevaṟkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu rāje
ntra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu brahmadeyam
vempaṟṟūrāṉa śrī coḻamāttāṇṭa caturvveti ma
ṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai makara nā
yaṟṟu putaṉkiḻamai peṟṟa tirukkeṭṭai nāṉṟu paka
l maṇṭatte
dhanmi ceytu
kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟa
kkūṭi Iriṉtu pa
ṇip paṇiyālp paṇittu nammūr śrīku
ṭittiṭṭai Iṉiteḻun=taruḷi Iruṉta
paramasvāmikku mulabhratyanāṉa caṇḍe
śvaradevar pakkal sabhaiyom koṇṭa kācu A
ṟupattaiñcu Ikkācu Aṟupattaiñcum
koṇṭu Iśrī kuṭittiṭṭai mahādevar nilam I
vvūr kīḻpiṭākai pārvvativatikkuk kiḻakku śrī Aru
moḻitevar vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇ
ṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu meṟkkaṭaiy It
devarkku muṉpu Adeyam ceytu kuṭutta nila
m paḻampaṭi Araiye Aṟumā mukkāṇi nikki Ita
ṉoṭu maṭaiyk kiḻakku māvaṇṭur tiruvārur nampi
kramavittaṉ nilattukkum paṉāṉtūr cimātava kra
ma vittaṉ nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkel
lai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai I
tdevaṟkku Adeyam ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku
k kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukkut teṟkkum
Āka Iṉṉānkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa paḻam
paṭinilam muṉṟumākkāṇi Itanāl Ulakaḷan=taruḷiye
eṟivaṉta mikaiñilam Orumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi mun=ti
rikaikkāl muntirikaik kuḻi mukkāle munṟumā mukkāṇi
ākanilam ṉāṉmāvarai Araikkāṇi mun=tirikaikkā
l mun=tirikaik kuḻi mukkāle muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyil
munnan=taram maṭakkivan=ta kuṟunilam Orumā mukkāṇikāl mun=tirikai kuḻi munṟumā Araikkāṇiyāllum Ivvāṭṭai makaranāyaṟu mutal Innilattāl van=ta paricililRead vācalilpon=ta Iṟai siddhāyakkācukkum pañcavāranellukku payaṟu
tuvaraikku Eṇṇai neykkum maṟṟum Epper(r)ppaṭṭa ŪruṭuvariRead ūriṭuvarikkum Eri Īvukkum kulaiyum kurampum Uḷḷiṭṭa veṭṭi vetaṉaikaḷum cilvarikaḷum sabhaiyome Ikkācu Aṟupattañcukku policai cekuttu Iṟaiyiṟukka kaṭavomākavum sabhai
yom Iṟaiyiṟukka Innilam Idevar Iṟaiyili Adeyame Anubhavikka peṟuvārākavum Innilattil bhokam Idevarkku tiruvamutukkum tiruvārātaṉai ceyvānukkum Allatu sabhaiyomukku Āka Av Āṇṭukaḷ śrīkā
ryyam ceyvārum Itdevar nilaṅkaḷil Iṟainilañcuṭṭi Innilattil pokam koḷḷa peṟātomāka Ipparicu Irukāl Āvatum Ikkācu Aṟupattaiñcum koṇṭu Ikkācukkum paricaicekuttu Inni
lam parappa maṭakkivanta kuṟunilam Orumā mukkāṇi kāl muntirikaikkuḻi munṟumā Araikkāṇikku sabhaiyome Iṟaiyiṟukka Innilam can=tirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili Anubhavikka peṟuvārākavum paṇiyāl paṇi
ttuvamaṇamRead ‘ pramāṇam ’Eḻutikkuṭuttom sabhaiyom Itil tirampil padāsaṉattilRead ‘ dharmmāsaṉattil ’munpu nilakkilum nillāviṭilum Idevar kanmikaḷ tāṅkaḷ veṇṭukaḷattil tāṅkaḷ veṇṭum pon manṟiyiṟuppittum
Innilam Idevar Adeyame Anubhavikka peṟuvārāka Ipparicu paṇip paṇiyāl paṇittu cantrātittavar Adeyam ceytu pramāṇam Eḻutikkuṭuttom śrī kuṭittiṭṭai Inin=teḻātaruḷi Irun=ta paramasvāmikku mūlabhratya
nāna caṇḍeśvaradevarkku vempaṟṟūrākiya śrī coḻa māttāṇṭa caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ipparicu sabhaiy Irun=tu pramāṇam cayap paṇittār śrī Arumoḻitevacceri maṇalūr tāyan kecuvanum ja
ṉa nātacceri kuṇṭur Eñña Uruttira nārāyaṇa kramavittanum nittavinotacceri cannakuṭi viṣṇutāsakrama vittanum rājakesaricceri Aḷa Iḷaiya śrī vāsudevakramavittanum nikarili coḻacceri kuravaciri ti
ruvicallūr Aṭikaḷ kramavittanum Aḻakiya coḻacceri Iruṅkaṇṭi kaḷateyak kramavittanum ciṅkaḷān=takac ceri Aruvaṉpaṭaṟttu Akki kramavittanum kun=taḷavacceri paḻanantiṟattu śrī vāsutevakrama
vuttanum coḻakula cun=taraccerimāvaṇṭur Attoṇi daśapriyaRead ‘daśapriya’paṭṭa comāciyār makan Utaiya divākara kramavittanum coḻamāttāṇṭacceri velvaṭṭi ciṅkappirān paṭṭanum rājarājac cerimāṅkaḷūr Aṇ
ṇa muñci kramavittanum paṇiyāl Ipramāṇam Eḻutinen Ivvūrkaṭikai madhyastan śrīmātavan virakocattān Ākiya Eṇṇāyiravanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr vaikāṉasaṉ gauta
maṉ kecuvan tāmotirapaṭṭanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ipparicu paṇiyāl madhyastan ciraḷaṅkovinen Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr kaṭikai madhyastan nampan cantiranāṉa Eḻāyirattu Aiññūṟṟuvanen Ivai
En Eḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇiyāl madhyastan civapātacekaran Utaiyativākaranen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivūr veṇkovan tāmotiran tiruvicalūr Aṭikaḷen Ippaṭi Aṟiven cuḷḷaṅkuṭaiyān kecuvan tiṭṭai
yen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr vaikhāṉasan gautaman cīmātavan tāmotirapaṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivūr civabrāhmaṇan canna vijayanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ippativāḻ veḷḷāḷaṉ Entai yar mātevan Empirān
muntaiyāḷe cikarappānāna naṟtaḷikaneṭumātaṅkiyacir Appiramaiyanen nenpen §
Digital edition of SII 25.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
